worldData.instructions:
SIGNAL — a television tuned by language.

The picture is a living chemical reaction, not a recording. TYPE ANY WORD and press ENTER: the word becomes physics. Try coral, storm, cells, ocean, maze, stars, death.

Drag the mouse to pour reagent into the tube.

The LEDs along the bottom bezel are thermostat shaders, each holding its patch of reality steady: amber = hunting, green = locked. Words the thermostats cannot survive exist.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: SIGNAL: words tune a living reaction; thermostat shaders co-calibrate it
